accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items.
accommodations.source_quote: Provide a word bank for written-response items.

accommodations.text: Give a two-minute warning before transitions.
accommodations.source_quote: Give a two-minute warning before transitions.

accommodations.text: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.

accommodations.text: Break long assignments into smaller submitted parts.
accommodations.source_quote: Break long assignments into smaller submitted parts.

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction (executive functioning): 100 minutes per week; 50 minutes, 2 times weekly; provider: Special education teacher.

goals.text: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.
goals.baseline: Arrives with required materials in 3 of 10 class days.
goals.source_quote: Ethan will arrive to class with required materials in 8 of 10 class days.

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Begins a task within two minutes in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: Marcus will independently begin a classroom task within two minutes of the direction in 4 of 5 opportunities.

goals.text: Given a grade-level text, Aanya will identify the main idea and two supporting details with 80% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Identifies the main idea with 40% accuracy.
